Start passing NCEA.

Passit is your AI study coach that knows every NCEA standard. It tracks your credits, flags your deadlines, and tells you exactly what to study — every single day.

Credit Tracker
Always know exactly where you stand across all three NCEA levels — updated as results come in.
AI Study Coach
Knows every Achievement Standard. Builds your daily plan. Explains exactly what the marker wants.
Deadline Tracker
Every internal, every external — ranked by urgency, with daily reminders. Never miss a due date again.
Why Passit?

Other tools show you information.
Passit tells you what to do.

Generic study apps don't know NCEA. Passit does.
